predicates.name: leaves_other_heirs
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves other heirs.

predicates.name: leaves_no_heirs
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves no heirs.

predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: is_estate_of
predicates.description: The estate belongs to the deceased person.

predicates.name: acquires_full_ownership_of
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires full ownership of the entire estate.
